message:
feat: EPG guide, web remote, TV shell, warm failover

- Rewrite GuideScreen as ConsumerStatefulWidget with timeline ruler,
  time indicator, and programme block slots
- Add WebRemoteServer with embedded HTML/JS remote UI, WebSocket
  control, and PIN pairing via shelf
- Add TvShell with D-pad sidebar navigation and TvFocusCard for
  10-foot TV experience
- Add WarmFailoverEngine (pro) with background stream health probing,
  latency-sorted best alternative selection
- Add 7 warm failover tests (31 total tests passing)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
